response.justification: While the resume demonstrates strong general software engineering leadership and 20+ years of development experience, it has critical gaps for this role's core requirements. The candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus the 8-year minimum requirement, and their background is primarily web/backend JavaScript/TypeScript work. Although they show exposure to distributed systems (Dunnhumby microservices), Kubernetes, and Docker, they lack 5 years of dedicated large-scale infrastructure experience and production cloud compute architecture, which are foundational to the technical lead position.
strengths: Proven technical leadership with multiple staff-level roles and strong mentoring track record through workshops, code dojos, and open-source project stewardship
Extensive full-stack product development experience with demonstrated ability to ship successful products (Apple TV top-10 ranking) and manage technical complexity
Exposure to infrastructure concepts including microservices at scale (millions of requests/second), Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and database optimization
concerns: Critical C++ gap: only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments) versus 8-year minimum requirement; primary expertise is JavaScript/TypeScript
Generalist background with shallow specialization: broad experience across many languages (D, PHP, Java, Swift, C#) suggests surface-level expertise rather than the deep infrastructure focus required
Limited cloud architecture depth: minimal production-level cloud compute platform experience; AWS CDK and Kubernetes work are secondary to main role rather than core specialization

key_factors.factor: Large-scale infrastructure and cloud architecture experience
